title: AgroStar is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: AgroStar is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
AgroStar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AgroStar:
AgroStar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar!
